reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify the owner of the pseudonym Frank Talk.
2. Using that person, determine another published title associated with their writings.
original_final_question: What was another title published by the owner of the pseudonym Frank Talk? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Who published articles under the pseudonym Frank Talk? Evidence: Steve Biko: His ideas were articulated in a series of articles published under the pseudonym Frank Talk. -> Steve Biko

Node 2: What compilation of writings by Steve Biko is another published title? Evidence: I Write What I Like: I Write What I Like (full name "I Write What I Like: Selected Writings by Steve Biko") is a compilation of writings from anti-apartheid activist Steve Biko. -> I Write What I Like
Final answer: I Write What I Like
